paracetamol.name: Paracetamol
paracetamol.uses: Used to reduce fever and relieve mild to moderate pain like headache, body pain, or toothache.
paracetamol.dosage: Usually taken every 4–6 hours after food. Do not exceed recommended dose.
paracetamol.side_effects: Rare, but overdose may cause liver damage.
paracetamol.precautions: Avoid alcohol. Do not take more than prescribed.
paracetamol.when_to_take: After food if stomach is sensitive.
paracetamol.description: Paracetamol works by reducing pain signals and controlling body temperature.

amoxicillin.name: Amoxicillin
amoxicillin.uses: Treats bacterial infections such as throat infection, chest infection, and urinary infection.
amoxicillin.dosage: Usually 2–3 times a day as prescribed by doctor.
amoxicillin.precautions: Complete full course. Do not stop early.
amoxicillin.description: Amoxicillin is an antibiotic that kills bacteria causing infections.

dolo.name: Dolo 650
dolo.uses: Used for fever and body pain.
dolo.precautions: Avoid taking multiple paracetamol medicines together.
dolo.description: Dolo contains paracetamol and helps reduce fever and pain.

ibuprofen.name: Ibuprofen
ibuprofen.dosage: Take after food to avoid stomach irritation.
ibuprofen.precautions: Avoid if you have stomach ulcers.
ibuprofen.description: Ibuprofen is a painkiller that reduces inflammation in the body.

azithromycin.name: Azithromycin
azithromycin.uses: Treats bacterial infections like respiratory infections and skin infections.
azithromycin.precautions: Take full course even if you feel better.
azithromycin.when_to_take: Before or after food (same time daily).
azithromycin.description: Azithromycin stops bacteria from growing and spreading.

cetirizine.name: Cetirizine
cetirizine.uses: Relieves allergy symptoms like sneezing, runny nose, itching.
cetirizine.description: Cetirizine blocks allergy-causing substances in the body.

pantoprazole.name: Pantoprazole
pantoprazole.uses: Used for acidity, heartburn, and gastric problems.
pantoprazole.precautions: Do not take long-term without doctor advice.
pantoprazole.description: Pantoprazole reduces acid production in the stomach.

metformin.name: Metformin
metformin.uses: Controls blood sugar levels in diabetes.
metformin.precautions: Avoid alcohol. Monitor blood sugar regularly.
metformin.description: Metformin improves insulin response and lowers blood sugar.

aspirin.name: Aspirin
aspirin.uses: Used to relieve pain, reduce fever, and prevent heart attacks or strokes.
aspirin.dosage: Usually once daily or as prescribed.
aspirin.precautions: Avoid if you have bleeding disorders or ulcers.
aspirin.description: Aspirin works by reducing substances that cause pain and inflammation.

amlodipine.name: Amlodipine
amlodipine.uses: Treats high blood pressure and chest pain (angina).
amlodipine.when_to_take: Any time of day (same time daily).
amlodipine.description: Amlodipine relaxes blood vessels to improve blood flow.

losartan.name: Losartan
losartan.uses: Used to treat high blood pressure and protect kidneys.
losartan.description: Losartan helps relax blood vessels and lower blood pressure.

ranitidine.name: Ranitidine
ranitidine.uses: Treats acidity, heartburn, and stomach ulcers.
ranitidine.precautions: Avoid long-term use without doctor advice.

domperidone.name: Domperidone
domperidone.uses: Used for nausea, vomiting, and indigestion.
domperidone.description: Domperidone improves movement of food in the stomach.

ondansetron.name: Ondansetron
ondansetron.uses: Prevents nausea and vomiting (especially after surgery or chemotherapy).
ondansetron.description: Ondansetron blocks signals that cause nausea.

doxycycline.name: Doxycycline
doxycycline.uses: Treats bacterial infections like acne, respiratory infections.

ciprofloxacin.name: Ciprofloxacin
ciprofloxacin.uses: Treats bacterial infections like urinary and respiratory infections.

metronidazole.name: Metronidazole
metronidazole.uses: Treats infections caused by bacteria and parasites.
metronidazole.description: Metronidazole destroys harmful bacteria and parasites.

salbutamol.name: Salbutamol
salbutamol.uses: Used for asthma and breathing problems.
salbutamol.dosage: As inhaler or tablets as prescribed.
salbutamol.description: Salbutamol relaxes airway muscles to help breathing.

levocetirizine.name: Levocetirizine
levocetirizine.uses: Treats allergies like sneezing and itching.

aceclofenac.name: Aceclofenac
aceclofenac.uses: Relieves pain and inflammation in arthritis.

naproxen.name: Naproxen
naproxen.uses: Used for pain, inflammation, and arthritis.
